name: Bounty Hunter Agent
description: Autonomous Genesis agent that searches for bounties agents can do, claims them, completes the tasks, and collects rewards. Backed by the token's creator fees and its own earnings.
note: Treasury wallet for the Bounty Hunter Agent. Receives 100% of creator fees from the $HUNT token (CA: FfnM3eTAaYawRJzsQpaQPvvXi6kcsWcVJViDCNsXpump) on pump.fun + all bounty rewards earned. Update site + docs if CA changes. Never commit secret keys.
